events.title: SJW Presents: Ruth Davies’ Blues Night featuring Sean “Mack” McDonald
events.description: Returning for its 23rd edition, Ruth Davies’ Blues Night is a bona fide Stanford Jazz tradition that ensures that the music’s essential roots are explicitly recognized and honored. events.title: Iwa Daiko
events.description: The Sacramento-based taiko collective Iwa Daiko builds community through the thunderous power of percussion. Roughly translated, Iwa Daiko means “Collective Purpose,” signifying music’s singular ability to bring people together for the sharing of authentic expression.
